programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 3
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Mike Richman, light heavyweight championship bout. From Feb. 17, 2023 at Tingly Coliseum in Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania IV
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Thiago Alves, light heavyweight; Mick Terrill vs. Lorenzo Hunt, heavyweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Peacock Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: BKFC 39
programme.desc: March 24, 2023. Features Reggie Barnett Jr. defending BKFC bantamweight title against Daniel Alvarez, plus Britain Hart vs. Jenny Clausius for BKFC women's strawweight title from Norfolk, Virginia.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Logan Storley vs. Brennan Ward, welterweight bout; Valentin Moldavsky vs. Steve Mowry, heavyweight bout; Dalton Rosta vs. Aaron Jeffery, middleweight bout; Sidney Outlaw vs. Islam Mamedov, lightweight bout. From Aug. 11, 2023 in Sioux Falls, S.D.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Johnny Eblen vs. Fabian Edwards, middleweight championship bout; Aaron Pico vs. Pedro Carvalho, featherweights; Mads Burnell vs. Daniel Weichel, featherweights. From Sept. 23, 2023 in Dublin.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Dick Howser Stadium in Tallahassee, Fla.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Dick Howser Stadium in Tallahassee, Fla.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From CHS Field in Saint Paul, Minn.

programme.title: BKFC 27
programme.desc: From Aug. 20, 2022. Features Mike Perry vs. Michael Page, plus Connor Tierney vs. Joe Elmore in bare knuckle boxing action from London.

programme.title: BKFC 28: Ferea vs. Starling
programme.desc: Features Christine Ferea vs. Taylor Starling for BKFC women's flyweight title, plus John Dodson vs. Ryan Benoit in bare knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico. From Aug. 27, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 41
programme.desc: Features Mike Perry vs. Luke Rockhold, Eddie Alvarez vs. Chad Mendes, plus Christine Ferea vs. Bec Rawlings for BKFC women's flyweight title from Broomfield, Colo. From April 29, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 38
programme.desc: April 21, 2023. Features Dat Nguyen vs. Daniel Straus, plus Jake Bostwick vs. Isaac Doolittle in bare-knuckle boxing action from Delray Beach, Florida.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Justin Young, Evan Sofer, Eric Hicks, James Bord, Eric Persson, Eric Wasserson and Eric Worre playing $200/$400 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.desc: Justin Young, Evan Sofer, Eric Hicks, James Bord, Eric Persson, Eric Wasserson and Eric Worre are playing $200/$400 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.title: Bellator 300
programme.desc: From Oct. 7, 2023. Features three title fights from some of Bellator's most recognizable champions in MMA action. From San Diego.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Yaroslav Amosov vs. Jason Jackson, welterweight title bout. From Nov. 17, 2023 at Wintrust Arena in Chicago.

programme.desc: Daily sports talk with The Coach.

programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Eddie Alvarez, middleweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Maverik Center in Salt Lake City.

programme.title: BKFC 63: Hart vs.Starling
programme.desc: Britain Hart vs. Taylor Starling, strawweight championship; Josh Dyer vs. William Albrecht, light heavyweight; Josh Burns vs. Sam Shewmaker, heavyweight. From Sturgis Buffalo Chip in Sturgis, S.D. on Aug. 3, 2024.

programme.title: BKFC 41 Colorado: Perry vs. Rockhold
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Luke Rockhold, light heavyweight bout; Christine Ferea vs. Bec Rawlings, women's flyweight championship bout. From 1stBank Center in Broomfield, Colo.

programme.title: BKFC 62
programme.desc: Kai Stewart vs. Bryan Duran, featherweight title bout; Keith Richardson vs. Alberto Blas, championship bout; Jared Warren vs. Jomi Escoboza, light heavyweight title bout. From Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 42 Greenville: Soto vs. Goodjohn
programme.desc: Antonio Soto III vs. Tyler Goodjohn, lightweights; Doug Coltrane vs. Blake LaCaze, middleweights. From Bon Secours Wellness Arena in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: Warriors Cup
programme.desc: Warriors Cup is the sole US partner of ONE Championship, featuring top Muay Thai athletes from across America and around the world!

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Juan "The Spaniard" Archuleta (25-2) makes the first defense of his Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Championship against Sergio "S.P." Pettis (20-5) in a five-round main event. From May 7, 2021 at Mohegan Sun Casino, Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Cris Cyborg takes on Leslie Smith in the main event from Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn. Cyborg and Smith first fought in the UFC in 2016. From May 21, 2021.

programme.sub-title: In The Zone: Da Hui Backdoor Shootout at Pipeline
programme.desc: We check out the Da Hui Backdoor Shootout at Pipeline in epic conditions!

programme.sub-title: In The Zone: 3rd annual Hualalai OC1 Canoe Race

programme.desc: Two Aussies embark on an adventure of a lifetime by taking on the challenge to surf in all 28 states of India!

programme.desc: Two Aussies embark on an adventure of a lifetime by taking on the challenge to surf in all 28 states of India!

programme.title: Rob Warner’s Wild Rides
programme.desc: Rob Warner heads to Kenya with Matt Jones where they ride one of the highest mountains in Africa.

programme.title: Rob Warner’s Wild Rides
programme.desc: Rob Warner, along with Matt Jones, head to Lesotho where they experience a different kind of racing.

programme.title: The Road Less Eaten with Biju Thomas
programme.desc: Biju Thomas visits Maine to take in the local cuisine and adventures.

programme.desc: From pizza and beer to the best Filipino food truck around, the Bentonville, Arkansas food scene is jumping.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR's highly trained volunteers drop everything to rescue the injured in their community.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A mountain biker crashes on a remote trail. SAR performs a long-line helicopter rescue against the clock.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County Search & Rescue races to save a teen who drove a snowmobile off a cliff.

programme.desc: Ellis Emmett has his first brush with royalty on the island kingdoms of Wallis & Futuna.

programme.desc: Musician and producer Toro y Moi delivers a mesmerizing performance of his blend of chillwave and funk.

programme.desc: Episode 6 visits the final frontier; Alaska. Endless summer days dictated by nature for a true adventure.
